libraryDescription:
The VCSSL Sound library is a standard library for handling sound.

The basic flow of sound playback in VCSSL is as follows.

First, load sound data from a file with the newSound function.Currently, the only sound format available in VCSSL is the WAVE format, with the file extension .wav.

Next, set the volume with the setSoundGain function,and then start playback with the startSound function.Sound playback is performed asynchronously with respect to VCSSL program execution.In other words, VCSSL processing continues without waiting for the sound playback to finish.The same applies when multiple sounds are played. Sounds are played asynchronously without waiting for one another to finish.

When sound playback finishes, the onSoundEnd event handler is called.If you want to repeat playback of a sound, specify the frame value 0 to the setSoundFramefunction there to rewind the sound, and then play it again with the startSound function.

function0.name: newSound
function0.description: Loads a sound file, creates sound data from it, assigns its unique identifier, called the sound data ID, and returns it.
function0.parameters: (string type) filePath : The name or path of the sound file to be loaded. At present, only the WAV format is supported.
function0.returnValue: (int type) The sound data ID assigned to the created sound data.

function1.name: deleteSound
function1.parameters: (int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data.

function2.name: startSound
function2.parameters: (int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data.

function3.name: stopSound
function3.description: Stops playback of a sound temporarily.
function3.parameters: (int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data.

function4.name: setSoundGain
function4.description: Sets the volume gain of a sound.
function4.parameters:
(int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data. 
(float type) gain : The volume gain.

function5.name: setSoundFrame
function5.description: Sets the playback position of a sound in units of frames.
function5.parameters:
(int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data. 
gain : The playback position frame.

function6.name: getSoundFrame
function6.description: Gets the playback position of a sound in units of frames.
function6.parameters: (int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data.
function6.returnValue: (int type) The current playback position frame.

function7.name: getSoundFrameLength
function7.description: Gets the length of a sound in units of frames.
function7.parameters: (int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data.
function7.returnValue: (int type) The total number of frames.

function8.name: setSoundTime
function8.description: Sets the playback position of a sound in units of time, in milliseconds.
function8.parameters:
(int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data. 
(int type) milliSec : The playback position time in milliseconds.

function9.name: getSoundTime
function9.description: Gets the playback position of a sound in units of time, in milliseconds.
function9.parameters: (int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data.
function9.returnValue: (int type) The playback position time in milliseconds.

function10.name: getSoundTimeLength
function10.description: Gets the length of a sound in units of time, in milliseconds.
function10.parameters: (int type) soundID : The ID of the target sound data.
function10.returnValue: (int type) The total number of milliseconds.
